description: Validate the steward records delegated child outcomes through bounded rollout metadata instead of importing the full child transcript.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::virtual_tools::tests::test_try_handle_virtual_tool_call_invoke_delegated_skill_records_successful_tool_call --lib -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::virtual_tools::tests::test_try_handle_virtual_tool_call_invoke_delegated_skill_bounds_preview_and_payload --lib -- --exact
assertions: delegated tool calls produce successful rollout records
preview text and persisted payload stay bounded
child run metadata stays out of the parent tape payload
